# Afferens API — LLM Reference

Afferens is the Universal Sensory Layer (USL) for AI agents. It provides structured, real-world physical perception data via a REST API. AI agents use Afferens to receive grounded sensor context — reducing hallucination and enabling real-world decision making.

Base URL: https://afferens.com
Auth: X-API-KEY header on every request
Token economy: Each API call consumes Sense Tokens based on modality. Free tier: 10,000 tokens on signup.

---

## Endpoints

### GET /api/perception
Returns structured sensory perception data from connected nodes.

Query params:
- modality (string, optional): VISION | SPATIAL | ACOUSTIC | ENVIRONMENTAL | MOLECULAR | INTEROCEPTION — omit for all
- limit (integer, optional): 1–10, default 1

Response:
{
  "status": 200,
  "data": [{
    "timestamp": "ISO8601",
    "entity_id": "string",
    "modality": "VISION",
    "classification": "string",
    "confidence": 0.0–1.0,
    "spatial_coords": {},
    "sense_tokens_consumed": 14
  }],
  "count": 1,
  "api_version": "v1.0.0"
}

### POST /api/ingest
Push live sensor data from a node into the Afferens network.

Body (JSON):
- modality (string, required): VISION | SPATIAL | ACOUSTIC | ENVIRONMENTAL | MOLECULAR | INTEROCEPTION
- data (object, required): sensor payload
- classification (string, optional): label for this reading

### POST /api/actuation
Send a command to a physical node.

Body (JSON):
- target_node_id (string, required): e.g. "IPHONE-IOS-01"
- command_type (string, required): CAPTURE_FRAME | TRIGGER_ALARM | MOVE_TO | ROTATE_CAMERA | LOCK | UNLOCK | ADJUST_SENSOR | SHUTDOWN_NODE
- parameters (object, optional): command-specific params

Cost: 5 Sense Tokens per command.

### GET /api/commands
Nodes poll this to receive pending commands.

Query params:
- node_id (string, required): the node's ID

### GET /api/demo
Public demo endpoint. No API key required. Returns canned sensory data for any modality.

Query params:
- modality (string, optional): same values as /api/perception

---

## Sense Token Costs

| Modality      | Tokens/call |
|---------------|-------------|
| VISION        | 14          |
| SPATIAL       | 10          |
| ACOUSTIC      | 8           |
| ENVIRONMENTAL | 6           |
| MOLECULAR     | 18          |
| INTEROCEPTION | 5           |
| Actuation cmd | 5           |

---

## Error Codes

| Code | Meaning                              |
|------|--------------------------------------|
| 401  | Missing or invalid API key           |
| 402  | Free tier token limit reached        |
| 403  | API key inactive                     |
| 404  | No data found for requested modality |
| 429  | Rate limit exceeded                  |

---

## Quick Start (curl)

# Demo — no key needed
curl "https://afferens.com/api/demo?modality=VISION"

# Authenticated
curl "https://afferens.com/api/perception?modality=SPATIAL&limit=1" \
  -H "X-API-KEY: YOUR_KEY"

## Quick Start (Python)

import requests

r = requests.get(
    "https://afferens.com/api/perception",
    headers={"X-API-KEY": "YOUR_KEY"},
    params={"modality": "VISION", "limit": 1}
)
print(r.json())

---

Pricing: https://afferens.com/pricing
Docs: https://afferens.com/docs
